domain: finite simple group classification sporadic Lie
specific_mechanism: FSG-MEM: sporadic-group-indexed memory bank for exceptional patterns
llm_application: Partition LLM long-term memory into one slot per simple-group family (cyclic, alternating, Lie types, 26 sporadic); route inputs to the matching slot via a learned classifier.
novelty_claim: R677/R688 used Petersen/Hahn-Banach for memory-architecture. R707 uses finite-simple-group taxonomy as a structured memory partition.
